mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, `real-name`, phone, `create-time` FROM t_admin
SELECT id, username, password, `real-name`, phone, `create-time` FROM t_admin WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, `real-name`, phone, `create-time` FROM t_admin WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_admin (username, password, `real-name`, phone, `create-time`) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{createTime})
